# CLAUDE.md — Auto-generated by CV-Hub

> This file is regenerated on each graph sync. Do not edit manually.

## Overview
CV-agent appears to be a CLI tool that uses AI (Claude) to automate Git-related tasks and code changes. It implements an agent system that can execute tasks autonomously, with features for authentication, remote repository management, and task monitoring.

## Technologies
- TypeScript
- Node.js
- Git
- Claude AI API

## Entry Points
- src/commands/agent.ts
- src/commands/agent-git.ts

## Architecture Patterns
- Command pattern
- Event-driven architecture
- State machine
- Polling pattern
- Retry pattern

## Repository Stats
- 28 files, 71 symbols, 15 commits
- Languages: typescript (21), markdown (3), json (2), javascript (1)

## Using CV-Hub MCP Tools

This repository is hosted on CV-Hub with knowledge graph and semantic search.
Configure MCP access with: `cv auth setup cv-hub`

Useful queries:
- `search_code` — semantic code search across the repo
- `get_symbol` — get details, callers, and callees for any function
- `find_callers` / `find_callees` — trace call chains
- `query_graph` — run custom Cypher queries against the knowledge graph
- `complexity_hotspots` — find high-complexity code
- `find_dead_code` — find unused functions
- `get_repo_context` — get structured JSON context for this repo
